Atty. CRAIG MURPHY, Esq. (Tel: 805-330-3393) for assignee Moorpark Recovery Service LLC;

ASSIGNEE MOORPARK RECOVERY SERVICE LLC's Motion For Filing Of Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The moving party did not serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, plus 5 calendar days for service by mail within the State of California, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Cheryl Meril, and individual dba Nob Hill Notary Services, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Defendants Joel Sean Gray and Joan Geiger were present at today's hearing, but defaults were entered against these defendants on February 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cheryl Meril, an individual dba Nob Hill Notary Services, and against the Defaulted Defendants Joel Sean Gray and Joan Geiger as follows:

Damages/Principal - $23,500.00.
Costs - $1,638.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $25,138.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Continued To May-28-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Continued To Mar-26-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
